name: Total Revenue
description: Total order revenue in USD including tax

name: Revenue per Customer
description: Average revenue generated per unique customer

name: Fulfillment Rate
description: Percentage of orders that have been fulfilled

name: Order Month
description: Month of order for trend analysis

name: Customer Segment
definition: CASE WHEN lifetime_value > 10000 THEN 'Enterprise' WHEN lifetime_value > 1000 THEN 'Mid-Market' ELSE 'SMB' END
description: Segment based on cumulative lifetime spend

name: Priority Level
definition: CASE WHEN priority <= 2 THEN 'High' WHEN priority <= 4 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'Low' END
